TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == == 泰雅族男子名 Sasan lalu mlikuy qu Sasan. mziboq slwan lga ryax sasan la. bnkis ta ga lhani qsuyan balay na laqi yabut tlalu squ Sasan.aki yan ryax sasan gmleng sswe mziboq qnzyat mtzyaw mtlu qoyat. Sasan Sasan. . 其他 sraral na ita Tayal hiya ga, son nha muci nanu smpung qu qutux ryax hya. t'aring mqwas ngta ru tehuk qu ska bengi qani. zik slwan lga, trang tmucing payat hazi ru t'aring mqwas ngta la. ru t'aring mngzyut mkaraw qu wagi uzi ru tehuk qu tmucing payat hazi ru t'aring mqwas ngta la. t'aring mngzyut mkaraw qu wagi uzi ru tehuk qu tmucing mopuw ga spngan nha mha sasan. (ryax)的時段概念包含了:sasan ,mzibuq ,zik slwan ,mqwas ngta ,kska bengi ,gbyan ,mhngan .時間觀念則是包含:skarkyas wagi (日升,約9點到10點),tpihung wagi ,mzibuq ,sasan slwan(天亮,約05:30左右),plpaw ,zik slwan ,minpusal mqwas ngta ,txan mqwas ngta ,ska bengi(半夜12點),zik ska bengi ,p'abi ,txalun m' abi laqi(約19-20點),kgbyan ,gbyan ,mzyup wagi ,syahaw rgyax wagi ,pqoyaw wagi .
S.PHON: == == ****** s~ɕas~ɕan lalu mlikuj qu s~ɕas~ɕan. mziβoq s~ɕlwan lɣa rjax s~ɕas~ɕan la. βnkis~ɕ ta ɣa lħani qs~ɕujan βalaj na laqi jaβut tlalu s~ɕqu s~ɕas~ɕan.aki jan rjax s~ɕas~ɕan ɣmleŋ s~ɕs~ɕwe mziβoq qnzjat mtzjaw mtlu qojat. s~ɕas~ɕan s~ɕas~ɕan. . ** s~ɕraral na ita tajal ħija ɣa, s~ɕon nħa muʦ~ʨi nanu s~ɕmpuŋ qu qutux rjax ħja. tʔariŋ mqwas~ɕ ŋta ru teħuk qu s~ɕka βeŋi qani. zik s~ɕlwan lɣa, traŋ tmuʦ~ʨiŋ pajat ħazi ru tʔariŋ mqwas~ɕ ŋta la. ru tʔariŋ mŋzjut mkaraw qu waɣi uzi ru teħuk qu tmuʦ~ʨiŋ pajat ħazi ru tʔariŋ mqwas~ɕ ŋta la. tʔariŋ mŋzjut mkaraw qu waɣi uzi ru teħuk qu tmuʦ~ʨiŋ mopuw ɣa s~ɕpŋan nħa mħa s~ɕas~ɕan. (rjax)********:s~ɕas~ɕan ,mziβuq ,zik s~ɕlwan ,mqwas~ɕ ŋta ,ks~ɕka βeŋi ,ɣβjan ,mħŋan .********:s~ɕkarkjas~ɕ waɣi (**,*******),tpiħuŋ waɣi ,mziβuq ,s~ɕas~ɕan s~ɕlwan(**,***:****),plpaw ,zik s~ɕlwan ,minpus~ɕal mqwas~ɕ ŋta ,txan mqwas~ɕ ŋta ,s~ɕka βeŋi(*****),zik s~ɕka βeŋi ,pʔaβi ,txalun mʔ aβi laqi(***-***),kɣβjan ,ɣβjan ,mzjup waɣi ,s~ɕjaħaw rɣjax waɣi ,pqojaw waɣi .
S.FORM: == == 泰雅族男子名 Sasan lalu mlikuy qu Sasan. mziboq slwan lga ryax sasan la. bnkis ta ga lhani qsuyan balay na laqi yabut tlalu squ Sasan.aki yan ryax sasan gmleng sswe mziboq qnzyat mtzyaw mtlu qoyat. Sasan Sasan. . 其他 sraral na ita Tayal hiya ga, son nha muci nanu smpung qu qutux ryax hya. t'aring mqwas ngta ru tehuk qu ska bengi qani. zik slwan lga, trang tmucing payat hazi ru t'aring mqwas ngta la. ru t'aring mngzyut mkaraw qu wagi uzi ru tehuk qu tmucing payat hazi ru t'aring mqwas ngta la. t'aring mngzyut mkaraw qu wagi uzi ru tehuk qu tmucing mopuw ga spngan nha mha sasan. (ryax)的時段概念包含了:sasan ,mzibuq ,zik slwan ,mqwas ngta ,kska bengi ,gbyan ,mhngan .時間觀念則是包含:skarkyas wagi (日升,約9點到10點),tpihung wagi ,mzibuq ,sasan slwan(天亮,約05:30左右),plpaw ,zik slwan ,minpusal mqwas ngta ,txan mqwas ngta ,ska bengi(半夜12點),zik ska bengi ,p'abi ,txalun m' abi laqi(約19-20點),kgbyan ,gbyan ,mzyup wagi ,syahaw rgyax wagi ,pqoyaw wagi .
S.PHON: == == ****** s~ɕas~ɕan lalu mlikuj qu s~ɕas~ɕan. mziβoq s~ɕlwan lɣa rjax s~ɕas~ɕan la. βnkis~ɕ ta ɣa lħani qs~ɕujan βalaj na laqi jaβut tlalu s~ɕqu s~ɕas~ɕan.aki jan rjax s~ɕas~ɕan ɣmleŋ s~ɕs~ɕwe mziβoq qnzjat mtzjaw mtlu qojat. s~ɕas~ɕan s~ɕas~ɕan. . ** s~ɕraral na ita tajal ħija ɣa, s~ɕon nħa muʦ~ʨi nanu s~ɕmpuŋ qu qutux rjax ħja. tʔariŋ mqwas~ɕ ŋta ru teħuk qu s~ɕka βeŋi qani. zik s~ɕlwan lɣa, traŋ tmuʦ~ʨiŋ pajat ħazi ru tʔariŋ mqwas~ɕ ŋta la. ru tʔariŋ mŋzjut mkaraw qu waɣi uzi ru teħuk qu tmuʦ~ʨiŋ pajat ħazi ru tʔariŋ mqwas~ɕ ŋta la. tʔariŋ mŋzjut mkaraw qu waɣi uzi ru teħuk qu tmuʦ~ʨiŋ mopuw ɣa s~ɕpŋan nħa mħa s~ɕas~ɕan. (rjax)********:s~ɕas~ɕan ,mziβuq ,zik s~ɕlwan ,mqwas~ɕ ŋta ,ks~ɕka βeŋi ,ɣβjan ,mħŋan .********:s~ɕkarkjas~ɕ waɣi (**,*******),tpiħuŋ waɣi ,mziβuq ,s~ɕas~ɕan s~ɕlwan(**,***:****),plpaw ,zik s~ɕlwan ,minpus~ɕal mqwas~ɕ ŋta ,txan mqwas~ɕ ŋta ,s~ɕka βeŋi(*****),zik s~ɕka βeŋi ,pʔaβi ,txalun mʔ aβi laqi(***-***),kɣβjan ,ɣβjan ,mzjup waɣi ,s~ɕjaħaw rɣjax waɣi ,pqojaw waɣi .
